name: Flat Design
description: Uses simple two-dimensional visuals, clean lines, and minimal details to improve usability and clarity.

name: Minimalist Design
description: Focuses on simplicity and content by removing unnecessary elements and emphasizing clarity.

name: Retro Design
description: Inspired by past decades with nostalgic visuals, textures, and typography.

name: Progressive Web Design (PWA)
description: Websites that behave like mobile applications, offering fast and app-like experiences.

name: Y2K Design
description: A nostalgic style inspired by early 2000s digital aesthetics.

name: Neo-Brutalism
description: A bold, raw design style with high contrast, simple layouts, and unpolished visuals.

name: Claymorphism
description: Soft, 3D-like UI elements with rounded shapes and pastel colors.

name: Behavioral Design
description: Design focused on influencing user behavior through rewards, feedback, and psychology.

name: Memphis Design
description: A playful, colorful style inspired by 1980s design with bold patterns and shapes.

name: Moving Typography
description: Combines text with animation to create dynamic and engaging experiences.

name: Interactive Design
description: Focuses on user interaction through micro-interactions and engaging experiences.

name: Parallax Scrolling
description: Uses layered scrolling effects to create depth and storytelling experiences.
